hallucination.rationale: The generated output is entirely a thinking/planning process and does not contain a final clinical note. No fabricated clinical content is present since no note was actually produced.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking/reasoning process and does not produce a completed clinical note. The instructions explicitly state to return ONLY the completed note with no preamble or explanations, which was completely violated.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was generated. All transcript content is missing from the output since only internal reasoning was produced.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured internal reasoning with no template sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No clinical note was generated, so no entity marking was attempted in any output.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains massive repetitive loops where the same checks and considerations are duplicated dozens of times.
